name: Stripe Revenue Ops
description: Revenue ops dashboard powered by Stripe: churn-risk surfacing, support-email evidence, and a refund execution pane with receipts. Live data flows in once Stripe is connected.

integrations.description: Pull Stripe metrics, identify churn risk, and execute refunds with receipts
Read support inbox to find customers who emailed support twice and notify on refund completion
Read support tickets to detect repeat contacts as a churn-risk signal
Post refund summaries and churn-risk alerts to the team
